nonBlockingIssues.description: SalesOrderItem described as '(embedded in order)' when it's actually a separate @Entity with @ManyToOne to SalesOrder. Functionally accurate (cascade-managed aggregate child) but imprecise persistence terminology.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Change to '(cascade-managed child of SalesOrder aggregate, table: sales_order_items)'

nonBlockingIssues.description: CancelRequest and StatusRequest listed as DTOs but are inner records of SalesController, not standalone DTOs in the dto package.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Note '(inner record of SalesController)' for these entries

nonBlockingIssues.description: Placeholder table names in Key Entities table for CreditRequest and CreditLimitOverrideRequest.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestedFix: Resolve actual @Table names from entity annotations

rejectedObservations.observation: DealerPortalCreditRequestCreateRequest.java is dead/unused code in the dto/ directory
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a source-code cleanup observation, not a documentation concern. The documentation correctly does not reference this DTO, and flagging dead code is outside the scope of a docs-only scrutiny pass.

rejectedObservations.observation: DealerRequest.java is an internal DTO used by services but not controllers
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a factual code observation that does not affect documentation quality. The docs packet correctly documents the controller-facing DTOs and does not need to enumerate internal service DTOs.
